attributes.title: [Airflow OTel] Scheduler & Capacity
attributes.description: Scheduler loop duration, critical section contention, executor and pool utilisation.

params.markdown:
## [Airflow OTel] Scheduler & Capacity

Scheduler loop, executor slots, and pool capacity.

query.esql:
TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_s = AVG(airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_s = AVG(airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL
| STATS slots = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL
| STATS slots = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
| STATS starving = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
| STATS starving = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving))

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_s = AVG(airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_s = AVG(airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.critical_section_duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_s = AVG(airflow.scheduler.critical_section_duration) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.critical_section_duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_s = AVG(airflow.scheduler.critical_section_duration) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.queued_tasks IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.running_tasks IS NOT NULL
| STATS open = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots)), queued = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.queued_tasks)), running = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.running_tasks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.executor.open_slots IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.queued_tasks IS NOT NULL OR airflow.executor.running_tasks IS NOT NULL
| STATS open = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.open_slots)), queued = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.queued_tasks)), running = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.executor.running_tasks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
| STATS starving = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving IS NOT NULL
| STATS starving = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(airflow.scheduler.tasks.starving)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC
